    "Halt the flanged joint assembly process immediately",
    "Disassemble the joint and discard the incorrect gasket",

  "rationale": "Installing an incorrect gasket material for the service fluid or pressure/temperature rating violates ASME PCC-1 and ASME B16.5 guidelines. It poses a high risk of joint failure, leakage, or blowout during testing or service. The assembly must be stopped, disassembled, and corrected before any further torqueing or pressure testing occurs.",
